data.content: Approved in implementation review. The diff is limited to adding a bulk 'Set state' dropdown in src/components/filter-bar.tsx for shipped, abandoned, and deferred, plus a focused smoke test in src/components/__tests__/bulk-edit-terminal-states.test.ts. Verified the selected values match valid terminal workflow states used elsewhere in the codebase. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery/.claude/worktrees/foolery-62fa-bulk-state: bun run lint (warnings only, exit 0), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (2041 passed, 11 skipped, 42 todo), and bun run build all passed. No invariant, security, or regression issues found for the requested behavior.
